title: hope:own ledger
description: One JSON document per project at ~/.claude/hope/own/<project-slug>/ledger.json, keyed by concept. Events are append-only — never edited or deleted; entries are never deleted, only tombstoned by a user-confirmed merge. No status field is stored anywhere: assisted/owned is derived at read time (rank.jq).

name.description: Concept named in the project's language.

description.description: One line. Must re-locate the concept in current code by itself — no volatile code references (paths, line numbers, churning symbols). If it can't, the description is bad.

events.description: Append-only probe events in chronological order.

debriefId.description: One id generated per debrief run, stamped on every event that run writes — distinct-debrief counts are exact group_by(.debriefId), never timestamp clustering.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601, produced by `date -u`, never hand-computed.

commit.description: HEAD at probe time. A locator hint for the next survey, never the baseline — the ledger is the baseline.

question.description: Verbatim probe question text — the audit trail that each re-probe is a genuine transformation, never a rephrase. Null only for survey verdicts (outcome=changed) where no question was asked.

transformedFrom.description: Reference to the prior probe this question transforms (debriefId of the source event); null for a concept's first probe and for survey verdicts.

outcome.description: pass/fail grade the model assigned, or the survey's 'changed' verdict (code moved out from under the concept).

mergedInto.description: Key of the canonical concept; the canonical entry received this entry's events intact. Future fuzzy matches resolve through tombstones in one hop.
